title: Peppery Croatian Cabbage Grill
description: A flavorful and crispy solo dinner featuring Chinese cabbage, inspired by Croatian cuisine, and suitable for a Whole30 diet.

ingredients.name: Coarse black pepper
ingredients.notes: use fresh, whole peppercorns if possible

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of avocado oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped cabbage and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic, coarse black pepper, and red pepper flakes, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the balsamic vinegar, lemon juice, and smoked paprika, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Transfer the cabbage mixture to a plate and let cool slightly.
Meanwhile, heat the remaining 1 tbsp of avocado oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
Divide the cooled cabbage mixture among four plates and top each plate with a drizzle of the hot oil, a sprinkle of parsley, and a pinch of salt.
